_doc: Classification of files for claude-bump-models. UPDATE paths get the sweep; PRESERVE paths are skipped (historical claims, research attributions, deprecated-plan records). Globs relative to claude-bump-models' configured roots.

_preserve_rationale.AUTONOMOUS_VISUAL_DESIGN_ARCHITECTURE.md: Design Arena Feb 2026 ranking claims are historical facts; rewriting falsifies research record
_preserve_rationale.feedback-agent-team-models.md: Rule intentionally documents deprecated models (opus-4-6, sonnet-4-6) so future agents recognize which models are banned from Max-plan auto mode — sweeping these refs would strip the pedagogical content
_preserve_rationale.feedback-claude-code-2.1.111-112-regress: Incident memory references specific version histories that must not be rewritten
